calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-07-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Nancy J. Newman, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claim Appeals. Respondent Rachele Ferraro appears in Pro Per. (Ms. Ms. Ferrora filed a substitution of attorney on 6/20/06, becoming a Pro Per respondent.) Appellant Sharman George appears in Pro Per. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
9:20am
Ms. Ferraro presents her case in the narrative
9:34am
Ms. George present her case in the narrative
9:40am
Judge Newman questions parties
9:50am
Matter is submitted. The court did not identify or admit any new evidence.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-04-2006 Continued To Jul-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-14-2006 Continued To Apr-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-18-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Nancy J. Newman, Clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
9:17am
Cause called for small claims appeals. Mark Carta, Esq. appearing for respondent Rachele Ferraro. No appearance by appellant Sharman George. Mr. Carton presents his case.
R-A Collective exhibit including a lien form, is marked and identified.
Mr. Carta is sworn and testifies in the narrative re attorney fees.
9:38am
Matter is submitted, R-A is retained by the court. Judgment is entered, evidence is returned.
